zh.lifeSummary: 當Guillaume de Coucy於1288年出生在法國豪-德-福朗斯艾斯勞時，他的父親Enguerrand V de Guînes-Coucy40歲，母親Christine Chétienne of BAILLEUL de Lindsay21歲。他於1306年與Beatrix de Thol在法國奧維-o-阿爾培斯艾維爾-素爾-艾結婚。他們至少是1個女兒的父母。他去世於1335年在法國豪-德-福朗斯艾斯普雷蒙特雷享年47歲，埋葬在法國洛萊姆特-吉莫瑟勒南希。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Guillaume de Coucy于1288年出生在法国豪-德-福朗斯艾斯勞时，他的父亲Enguerrand V de Guînes-Coucy40岁，母亲Christine Chétienne of BAILLEUL de Lindsay21岁。他于1306年与Beatrix de Thol在法国奧維-o-阿爾培斯艾維爾-素爾-艾结婚。他们至少是1个女儿的父母。他去世于1335年在法国豪-德-福朗斯艾斯普雷蒙特雷享年47岁，埋葬在法国洛萊姆特-吉莫瑟勒南希。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Coucy
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Americanized form of Arabic   Khoury   or   Khouri   ‘priest’. Compare   Courey  ,   Couri  , and   Cury  .
French: habitational name from a place so named in Vienne.

variants.name: Khoury
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Arabic/Muslim Nabil, Sami, Samir, Issa, Ibrahim, Ramzi, Bassam, Fouad, Habib, Issam, Jamil, Riad.  French Michel, Antoine, Emile, Pierre, Andre, Camille, Clemence, Clovis, Georges, Gisele, Henri, Jacques.

Arabic (mainly Lebanon, Syria, and Jordan): from khūrī ‘priest’, in particular a Christian priest. This surname is used among Christians, including Assyrians/Chaldeans. Compare Cory , Coury , Cury , Elkhoury , Khouri , Kory , Koury , and Kury .

nameMeanings.name: Guillaume
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: William
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

en.lifeSummary: When Guillaume de Coucy was born in 1288, in Laon, Aisne, Hauts-de-France, France, his father, Enguerrand V de Guînes-Coucy, was 40 and his mother, Christine Chétienne of BAILLEUL de Lindsay, was 21. He married Beatrix de Thol in 1306, in Neuville-sur-Ain, Ain, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, France. They were the parents of at least 1 daughter. He died in 1335, in Prémontré, Aisne, Hauts-de-France, France, at the age of 47, and was buried in Nancy, Meurthe-et-Moselle, Lorraine, France.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Guillaume de Coucy est né en 1288, à Laon, Aisne, Hauts-de-France, France, son père, Enguerrand V de Guînes-Coucy, avait 40 ans et sa mère, Christine Chétienne of BAILLEUL de Lindsay, avait 21 ans. Il a épousé Beatrix de Thol en 1306, à Neuville-sur-Ain, Ain, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, France. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fille. Il est décédé en 1335, à Prémontré, Aisne, Hauts-de-France, France, à l’âge de 47 ans, et a été enterré à Nancy, Meurthe-et-Moselle, Lorraine, France.

de.lifeSummary: Als Guillaume de Coucy 1288 in Laon, Aisne, Hauts-de-France, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Enguerrand V de Guînes-Coucy 40 und seine Mutter Christine Chétienne of BAILLEUL de Lindsay 21. Er hat 1306 in Neuville-sur-Ain, Ain, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, Frankreich Beatrix de Thol geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Tochter. Er starb 1335 im Alter von 47 Jahren in Prémontré, Aisne, Hauts-de-France, Frankreich und wurde in Nancy, Meurthe-et-Moselle, Lothringen, Frankreich begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Guillaume de Coucy è nato il nel 1288 nel Laon, Aisne, Hauts-de-France, Francia, il suo padre, Enguerrand V de Guînes-Coucy, aveva 40 anni e il suo madre, Christine Chétienne of BAILLEUL de Lindsay, aveva 21 anni. Lui sposato Beatrix de Thol nel 1306, nel Neuville-sur-Ain, Ain, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, Francia. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlia. Morì nel 1335, nel Prémontré, Aisne, Hauts-de-France, Francia, all'età di 47 anni, e fu sepolto a Nancy, Meurthe-et-Moselle, Lorraine, Francia.

ja.lifeSummary: Guillaume de Coucyが1288年にフランスハウトス-デ-フランスエイスンラオンで生まれた時，父Enguerrand V de Guînes-Coucyは40歳，母Christine Chétienne of BAILLEUL de Lindsayは21歳であった。1306年にフランスアウバーグネ-ルhoネ-アルペスエインネウヴィレ-スル-アインでBeatrix de Tholと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の娘の親であった。彼は1335年にフランスハウトス-デ-フランスエイスンプルeモントルeで47歳で死去し，フランスロレィヌメウルスエ-エト-モセルナンシにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Guillaume de Coucy(이)가 1288년 프랑스 하츠-데-프랜스 아이스니 라에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Enguerrand V de Guînes-Coucy(은)는 40세였고, 그의 어머니 Christine Chétienne of BAILLEUL de Lindsay(은)는 21세였다. 그는 1306년 프랑스 오버그니-ho니-알프스 언 니우비레-수-언에서 Beatrix de Thol(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1335년 프랑스 하츠-데-프랜스 아이스니 프e몽e에서 47세의 나이로 사망했으며 프랑스 로레이인 우르테-트-모셀 난시에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Guillaume de Coucy nasceu em 1288, em Laon, Aisne, Hauts-de-France, França, seu pai, Enguerrand V de Guînes-Coucy, tinha 40 anos e sua mãe, Christine Chétienne of BAILLEUL de Lindsay, tinha 21 anos. Ele casou-se com Beatrix de Thol em 1306, em Neuville-sur-Ain, Ain, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, França. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 1335, em Prémontré, Aisne, Hauts-de-France, França, com 47 anos, e foi sepultado em Nancy, Meurthe-et-Moselle, Lorraine, França.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Guillaume de Coucy родился в 1288 г. в местности лаон, эисн, хауц-де-фрэнс, Франция, его отцу по имени Enguerrand V de Guînes-Coucy было 40 лет, а матери, которую звали Christine Chétienne of BAILLEUL de Lindsay, 21. Он женился на женщине по имени Beatrix de Thol в 1306 г. в местности неувилле-сур-еин, эин, аувиргне-рoне-алпесь, Франция. У них была по крайней мере 1 дочь. Он умер в 1335 г. в местности прeмонтрe, эисн, хауц-де-фрэнс, Франция в возрасте 47 лет и был похоронен в местности нанси, меурте-ет-моселл, лорреаин, Франция.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Guillaume de Coucy nació en 1288, en Laon, Aisne, Hauts-de-France, Francia, su papá, Enguerrand V de Guînes-Coucy, tenía 40 años y su mamá, Christine Chétienne of BAILLEUL de Lindsay, tenía 21 años. Se casó con Beatrix de Thol en 1306, en Neuville-sur-Ain, Ain, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, Francia. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hija. Murió en 1335, en Prémontré, Aisne, Hauts-de-France, Francia, a la edad de 47 años, y fue sepultado en Nancy, Meurthe-et-Moselle, Lorraine, Francia.
